race.comment: Tricky to assess, and the betting moves will be instructive. BORDEAUX (1) has been well educated but looked a run short at Pakenham on debut ($7 SP). This is easier, and the blinkers go straight on. Coffey sticks and will likely push forward. In a top barn, and this looks winnable with the extra fitness. PURGATORIO (7) debuts and is also in a leading metro barn. Has the inside barrier and won a recent Cranbourne jumpout. FLASH INQUIRY (10) debuts and just missed in a recent Caulfield Heath jumpout. Has an awkward barrier but looks to have good ability. FAMOUS ROSY (3) debuts with a win at the Ararat jumpouts under the saddle. As with the above pair, the betting should give us a good guide to his ability/readiness and that of the other debutants as well.
